speaker: speaker2
text: What do I do with it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you want me to help you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Look . Here are the core classes . Everyone has to take them .

speaker: speaker2
text: So I don't have to worry about them .

speaker: speaker1
text: You're catching on ! However , there are elective courses like wood shop , metal shop , home economics ...

speaker: speaker1
text: Good . Now you can pick classes by yourself .
